original_image_tags: Handwritten letter on lined paper with several stamped markings. At the top right, a circled number "21". Overlapping the text in the center-right is a red stamp reading "EVIDENTIARY FILE" and "DO NOT DESTROY". There is also a stamped reference number: "62-83894-70". Another red stamp below that reads "RECORDED" and "31 SEP 8AM". A partial red stamp at the bottom left reads "89 X". The handwriting is in cursive ink. The text cuts off at the bottom of the page.

elements.description: Handwritten letter on a plain background. Contains handwritten text, a circled number '31' in the top right, a black smudge redaction near the top, and a red stamped mark partially obscured by handwriting in the middle-right.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict on the specific quoted stamp text ('EVIDENTIARY FILE', 'DO NOT DESTROY', '62-83894-70', 'RECORDED', '31 SEP 8AM') versus no such specific quotes in B, and they differ on the number inside the circled number ('21' vs '31').
